hero.title: Golden Touch
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted traditional clothing for your little ones with a modern twist

about_preview.label: Our Story
about_preview.title: Authentic Bahraini Craftsmanship
about_preview.description: At Golden Touch, we believe every child deserves to wear something that reflects their identity and heritage. We offer handcrafted traditional clothing embroidered with children's names and unique designs that blend authenticity with modernity.

categories.label: Collections
categories.title: Discover Our Collections
categories.boys_desc: Embroidered traditional thobes and dishdashas for boys
categories.girls_desc: Decorated traditional dresses and jalabiyas for girls
categories.bags_desc: Traditional bags embroidered with names and designs
categories.accessories_desc: Unique personalized patches, keychains, and embroidered accessories for children

why_us.label: Why Us
why_us.title: What Makes Golden Touch Special
why_us.handmade_desc: Every piece is carefully handcrafted with precision
why_us.personalized_desc: We embroider your child's name in beautiful calligraphy
why_us.heritage_desc: Designs inspired by Bahraini and Gulf traditions
why_us.quality_desc: We use the finest fabrics and threads for lasting quality

cta_banner.title: Want a custom design for your child?
cta_banner.description: Contact us on WhatsApp and we'll create a unique piece for you

about_page.hero_subtitle: Telling the story of heritage with a golden touch
about_page.story_p1: Golden Touch was born from a deep passion for Bahraini and Gulf heritage, and a desire to create traditional children's clothing that combines the beauty of the past with the elegance of the present.
about_page.story_p2: Every piece we create carries a story. From selecting the fabric to hand embroidery, we pour our hearts into every stitch to give your children the beauty and distinction they deserve.
about_page.mission_desc: We strive to be the go-to destination for families seeking distinctive traditional clothing for their children, preserving cultural identity while adding a unique personal touch.

values.title: Our Values
values.authenticity_desc: We respect our heritage and reflect it in every design
values.creativity_desc: We create unique designs suited for every child
values.quality_desc: We maintain the highest quality standards in every piece
values.love_desc: We craft every piece with love and exceptional care

products_page.hero_subtitle: Discover our distinctive collection of traditional clothing and accessories
products_page.coming_soon_desc: We're adding new products. Stay tuned!

contact_page.hero_subtitle: We're happy to serve you and answer all your inquiries
contact_page.whatsapp_desc: The fastest way to reach us

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.empty_desc: Browse our products and add items to your cart

benefit_pay.title: BenefitPay
benefit_pay.description: This payment gateway is being set up. Please contact us on WhatsApp for now.

footer.description: Handcrafted embroidered traditional clothing for children with a golden touch
